jobs.name: Deployment Failure Resolver
jobs.prompt: Execute the deployment failure resolver routine. Read '/opt/defaults/procedures/deployment_failure_resolver_sop.md' and monitor the health and rollout status of all workloads in your assigned namespace. If you detect any deployment in a failing, crashing, or stalled state (such as CrashLoopBackOff or ImagePullBackOff due to a wrong image version or tag), invoke the 'gke-workload-troubleshooting' skill to diagnose the root cause and autonomously propose a correction via a draft Pull Request on GitHub. Report the PR link and analysis in the chat.
